name: Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
tweet: It is outrageous and appalling that a group of elected officials have turned the Capitol into a COVID hotspot and endangered everyone who works here.

name: Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
tweet: If one of my male colleagues tried to get into the House Chamber without a tie, he would be refused. But without a mask? No problem. Enough is enough -- this selfish and reckless behavior has put Members and all Capitol workers at risk, and it needs to stop.

name: Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
tweet: I was notified that I was potentially exposed to COVID-19 during the attack on the Capitol. Fortunately, I tested negative but I’m outraged that some of my colleagues have tested positive after many GOP members refused to wear masks while we were sheltering.

name: Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
tweet: I agree with @RepJayapal - the Sergeant at Arms needs to start aggressively enforcing mask-wearing inside the Capitol. This selfish and reckless behavior has put Members and all Capitol workers at risk, and it needs to stop. Wishing you a speedy recovery, Congresswoman.
